title: EZ wynn
description: A Wynncraft modpack with mods and configs i like.(Has Pojav support)
body:
# **EZ wynn**
# The Dark Revamp

**Yo guys!**

This is my **first** modpack ':)

I hope you'll enjoy this experience!
____________________________________

Quick F.A.Q(Ongoing?):

- Q1: "Why Ez Wynn?"

- A1: Because it's EZ to Wynn!(get it?)

- Q2: "Why did you make it black and red?"

- A2: Ohh... **the Dark Revamp**(V0.10-s)? Seemed Cooler in my head!

- Q3: "Why Do you name your versions like that? V, 0.10, -s or even -a??"

- A3: Ez, Because i wanted to stand out, and: V(ersion), 0.10(version number) and -s(table) -a(lpha).

Outdated:

**FYI**:

1. I un-binded(Pressed Esc in the kebind settings) most keys to avoid key-conflicts.
2. I Changed some General, mod, resource-pack and shader-pack settings for maximized playing comfort.
3. Before playing on this modpack for the first time, i recommend checking the kebinds in the keybinds settings just to be sure what to press mid-game(also feel free to change stuff around!).
4. ~~Press F6(for funni)~~ (switched from camera utils to shoulder surfing, so no need for F6 anymore ig).
5. this is my first modpack, so be-aware of flaws(if any ***shrug***)
6. Daily reminder to stay hydrated and hygenic(Not optional)!
7. You lost the game!(Look up the game)



Note: Added support from V0.6-s and up for PojavLauncher and Forks if it, Now Mobile players can enjoy Wynncraft :)

~~IMPORTANT:
Every time i personally try to boot into a game it crashes for both pojav and zalith, if it also happens to you please stay patient. I'm at my job currently and will
fix it after work!~~
Update: Fixed it!
